title: Inactivity Fps Unlimiter
description: Removes the reduce fps on afk/minimized
body: To counter the setting of Reducing FPS when minimized/afk, which cannot be disabled, this mod overwrites the InactivityFpsLimiter's updating method to always return the maximum fps instead of a dynamic limiting number. This does not change anything visual/ui in the game, and leaves the minimized/afk settings without leaving them with function.
